inputs.label: Discharge Coefficient (C)
inputs.businessContext: Discharge coefficient accounting for flow contraction and friction losses, typically 0.6-0.7 for orifice plates.

inputs.label: Orifice Area (A)
inputs.businessContext: Cross-sectional area of the orifice or restriction.

inputs.label: Fluid Density (ρ)
inputs.businessContext: Density of the fluid. For water at 20°C, 998 kg/m³.

inputs.label: Pressure Difference (ΔP)
inputs.businessContext: Differential pressure across the orifice, measured in Pascals.
